entries.source: We have to look after ourselves now.
We both have almost missed the bus.
Do you want to have some coffee?
Last year I read a hundred books.
You must clean your room every day.
entries.reference: Don fertet čorget du lanja juohke beaivvi.

entries.source: What do you know about Brazil?
What do you do for a living?
They tried to do it by themselves.
He can speak a little English.
I had a neighbor who was blind.
entries.reference: Mus lei ránnjá gii lei čalmmeheapme.

entries.source: Once I thought I was wrong. Turns out I was mistaken.
entries.reference: Oktii gádden ahte ledjen meaddán, muhto feilejin.

entries.source: Bill, if you'll come with me, you'll float, too.
entries.reference: Bill, jus don boađát mu fárrui, don nai govddut.

entries.source: I got a letter from the municipality.
My dad is the best dad in the universe.
Have you bought a brand-new car?
entries.reference: Leatgo don oastán oba ođđa biilla?

entries.source: Tom sat down at a table near the window.
